name: Rural Funds Group
analysis: RFF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$2.0650, stop A$1.8909, target A$2.5873 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
